about: [Slim & Lightweight Portable Charger] This slim power bank measures just 14.5 × 6.9 × 1.9 cm and weighs only 260g. Slip it easily into your pocket, backpack, or handbag without adding extra bulk.

[Power Bank with Built-in Cables] Featuring 4 built-in charging options—USB-A, USB-C, Cable for iPhone, and Micro-USB—this portable charger eliminates the need for carrying extra cables. Charge anywhere without tangled cords.
[Convenient Lanyard Design] Designed with a practical built-in lanyard, this power bank can be attached to your bag or worn around your finger for quick and easy access.

[5 Outputs & 2 Inputs] Equipped with 5 outputs (USB-A port, USB-C cable, Built-in iPhone cable, Micro-USB cable, and USB-C port) and 2 input methods (USB cable and USB-C port), this charger supports charging up to 5 devices simultaneously.
[LED Digital Display] The bright LED display clearly shows the remaining battery level at a glance, keeping you informed of your power status anytime.
[Wide Compatibility] Compatible with most smartphones, tablets, and electronic devices, this portable charger provides reliable charging wherever you go.
[Reliable Quality & 2-Year Support] Enjoy peace of mind with our 2-year support. If any quality issues arise, we’ll provide a hassle-free replacement.
[What’s Included] 1 × Portable Charger, 1 × User Manual, plus 24/7 friendly customer support.
